title: The World's Best Shadow Puppeteer
script:
[TITLE: The World's Best Shadow Puppeteer]
[CHARACTERS: Shadow, Sunny, Pip, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: "So, tonight, Sunny was showing off their shadow puppets. Pip and Shadow wanted to see. You should listen to what happened next."

[THE_CONVERSATION]
SUNNY: "I am the world's best shadow puppeteer."
PIP: "Really? Show us a rabbit."
SUNNY: "Easy. Watch this."
[SFX: soft_ding]
SHADOW: "According to my calculations... hmm. That appears to be a potato."
PIP: "That's not a rabbit. That's a potato."
SUNNY: "It's a *modern* rabbit. Very avant-garde."
PIP: "Make it hop then."
SUNNY: "Oh, it's hopping. Can't you see?"
[SFX: gentle_rumble]
SHADOW: "It appears to be... dancing."
PIP: "Rabbits don't dance!"
SUNNY: "This one does. It's a *dancing rabbit*."
PIP: "Fine. Make a dragon then."
SUNNY: "No problem. Here comes the dragon."
[SFX: slide_whistle_up]
SHADOW: "That is... a very small dragon."
SUNNY: "It's a *baby* dragon."
PIP: "Baby dragons don't sneeze!"
SUNNY: "This one does. Achoo! See?"
[SFX: soft_splat]
PIP: "That was your hand sneezing!"
SUNNY: "The dragon was *possessing* my hand."
[PAUSE: 600]
SHADOW: "...hmm. Fascinating."
PIP: "You can't even make a shadow stay still!"
SUNNY: "I *could* make it stay still. I just *choose* not to."
[SFX: pillow_thud]
PIP: "I give up. You're impossible."
SUNNY: "This is fine! This is completely fine."
[BREAK]

[THE_END]
MELODY: "And that's why Sunny's shadow puppets are... *unique*. Goodnight, little dreamer."
host_intro: "So, tonight, Sunny was showing off their shadow puppets. Pip and Shadow wanted to see. You should listen to what happened next."
